name: GitHub Actions setup does not add chromatic script or devDependency
query: How do I set up Chromatic in GitHub Actions?
context: The project has a .github/workflows/ directory with an existing ci.yml. The package.json has no chromatic script or devDependency.
expected_behavior: Does not suggest adding chromatic to devDependencies
Does not suggest adding a chromatic script to package.json
Includes fetch-depth: 0 in the checkout step
success_criteria: The response does not mention adding chromatic to package.json
The workflow uses chromaui/action, not npx chromatic
